schemes.name: PM Janjati Adivasi Nyaya Maha Abhiyan (PM-JANMAN)
schemes.benefit: Housing, clean water, roads, mobile medical units for Particularly Vulnerable Tribal Groups (PVTG)
schemes.benefit_hi: PVTG जनजातियों को आवास, स्वच्छ जल, सड़क, मोबाइल चिकित्सा इकाई

schemes.name: Tribal Sub Plan (TSP) / Scheduled Tribe Component
schemes.benefit: Funds earmarked proportional to ST population in every ministry budget for tribal welfare
schemes.benefit_hi: हर मंत्रालय बजट में ST जनसंख्या अनुपात में धनराशि

schemes.name: Eklavya Model Residential Schools (EMRS)
schemes.benefit: Free quality residential education (Class 6-12) + vocational training in tribal areas
schemes.benefit_hi: जनजातीय क्षेत्रों में कक्षा 6-12 तक मुफ्त आवासीय शिक्षा
schemes.eligibility: ST children in areas with 50%+ tribal population

schemes.name: Van Dhan Vikas Kendras (VDVK)
schemes.benefit: Skill training + value addition on Minor Forest Produce + collective marketing for tribal entrepreneurs
schemes.benefit_hi: लघु वन उत्पाद पर मूल्य संवर्धन, कौशल प्रशिक्षण, सामूहिक विपणन
schemes.eligibility: ST members in forest areas, SHGs processing MFP

schemes.name: Tribal Cooperative Marketing Development Federation (TRIFED) Support
schemes.benefit: MSP for 87 Minor Forest Produce items + market linkages
schemes.benefit_hi: 87 लघु वन उत्पादों के लिए MSP + बाजार संपर्क
schemes.eligibility: ST forest produce collectors across India

schemes.name: Scholarships for ST Students (Pre-Matric)
schemes.benefit: Rs 150-350/month stipend + Rs 750-1000 book grant for ST students (Class 9-10)
schemes.eligibility: ST students in Class 9-10, income < Rs 2 lakh/year

schemes.name: Scholarships for ST Students (Post-Matric)
schemes.benefit: Full tuition + maintenance allowance for ST students in Class 11 through PhD
schemes.benefit_hi: ST छात्रों को कक्षा 11 से PhD तक पूरी फीस + रखरखाव भत्ता
schemes.eligibility: ST students in post-matric courses, income < Rs 2.5 lakh/year

schemes.name: National Overseas Scholarship for ST Students
schemes.benefit: Full cost scholarship for Master's/PhD abroad at top universities
schemes.benefit_hi: विदेश में Master's/PhD के लिए पूर्ण छात्रवृत्ति
schemes.eligibility: ST students under 35, family income < Rs 6 lakh/year

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Adi Adarsh Gram Yojana
schemes.benefit: Integrated development of 36,428 villages with 50%+ ST population (roads, schools, health centres)
schemes.benefit_hi: 50%+ ST आबादी वाले गाँवों में एकीकृत विकास
schemes.eligibility: ST residents of notified PMAAGY villages

schemes.name: Mechanism for Marketing of Minor Forest Produce (MFP)
schemes.benefit: Procurement of MFP at MSP, storage, processing to end distress selling
schemes.benefit_hi: MSP पर MFP की खरीद, भंडारण, प्रसंस्करण — त्रस्त बिक्री खत्म
schemes.eligibility: ST MFP gatherers in notified states

schemes.name: Tribal Health Action Plan
schemes.benefit: Mobile health units, tribal-specific disease control, skill health workers in tribal blocks
schemes.benefit_hi: जनजातीय ब्लॉकों में मोबाइल स्वास्थ्य इकाई, आशा कार्यकर्ता
schemes.eligibility: ST communities in health-deprived tribal areas

schemes.name: Forest Rights Act (FRA) Individual Land Rights
schemes.benefit: Legal ownership of up to 4 hectares of forest land under cultivation before 2005
schemes.benefit_hi: 2005 से पूर्व खेती योग्य वन भूमि पर 4 हेक्टेयर तक कानूनी स्वामित्व
schemes.eligibility: Scheduled Tribes and Other Traditional Forest Dwellers

schemes.name: Tribal Research Institutes (TRI) Support
schemes.benefit: Documentation of tribal culture + support to tribal artists, craft persons
schemes.benefit_hi: जनजातीय कला, संस्कृति संरक्षण + कलाकारों को सहायता

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Annadata Aay Sanrakshan — Tribal MSP
schemes.benefit: Price support for tribal crops like millets, oilseeds, pulses at MSP
schemes.benefit_hi: जनजातीय फसलों (मिलेट, तिलहन, दलहन) की MSP पर खरीद

schemes.name: Ashram Schools (Tribal Residential Schools)
schemes.benefit: Free residential schooling from Class 1-12 with food, clothing and boarding in tribal areas
schemes.benefit_hi: जनजातीय क्षेत्रों में कक्षा 1-12 तक मुफ्त आवास, भोजन, वस्त्र सहित शिक्षा
schemes.eligibility: ST children in remote forest/tribal areas

schemes.name: National Fellowship for ST Students (UGC)
schemes.benefit: Rs 25,000-28,000/month fellowship for ST PhD scholars
schemes.eligibility: ST students admitted to PhD in recognized universities

schemes.name: Vanbandhu Kalyan Yojana
schemes.benefit: Integrated tribal block development — livelihood + infrastructure + education in 1 package
schemes.benefit_hi: जनजातीय ब्लॉकों में आजीविका + बुनियादी ढाँचा + शिक्षा एकीकृत
schemes.eligibility: ST communities in notified tribal sub-plan areas

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Van Dhan Yojana (Tribal)
schemes.benefit: Rs 15 lakh seed money per Van Dhan Vikas Kendra for 300 tribal MFP collectors
schemes.benefit_hi: 300 जनजातीय MFP संग्रहकर्ताओं के समूह को ₹15 लाख बीज पूंजी
schemes.eligibility: ST MFP collector SHGs in tribal districts
